ministry: Ministry of Finance / Department of Posts
benefit: High-interest (8.2% p.a. currently, revised quarterly) savings account for girl child. Maturity at 21 years or on marriage after 18. Partial withdrawal (50%) at 18 for education.
notes: Purely a savings scheme — no income or caste restriction. Eligibility is about the girl child's age and the account-opening limit.

conditions.description: Applicant is parent or legal guardian of a girl child
conditions.source: SSY Rules 2016, Rule 3 — account opened by natural or legal guardian

conditions.description: Girl child must be under 10 years of age at time of account opening
conditions.source: SSY Rules 2016, Rule 3(i) — 'girl child who has not attained the age of ten years'

conditions.description: Maximum 2 accounts per family (one per girl child, max 2 girls)
conditions.source: SSY Rules 2016, Rule 3(ii) — maximum two accounts per family
conditions.ambiguity_note: Third account allowed if twins/triplets are born in second birth. Requires birth certificate proof.
